title: Gowzan #1470
definition:
Gozan = "a cutting off"

 1) the Mesopotamian city on or near the middle of the Euphrates
    where exiled Israelites were settled
nasbUsage:
Definition: Gozan = "a cutting off"

 1) the Mesopotamian city on or near the middle of the Euphrates
    where exiled Israelites were settled

    NASB:  a city and area in Mesopotamia
